checked.note: verified in a running system - human pass 2026-07-20: app starts and renders like the original; no interaction paths were open for this port

deviations.what: ariaLabelledBy (since UI5 1.97) on the labeled GenericTag is newer than 1.71 but kept for the 1:1 port - the app needs a UI5 release >= 1.97 to render it.

the sample's Page.controller.js defines a press handler (MessageToast 'The GenericTag is pressed.') that is not referenced anywhere in Page.view.xml - no GenericTag carries a press attribute - so the port wires no event; the rendered view is a faithful 1:1 rebuild.
